payload.answer: Brain DB is the source of truth; Cognee is a rebuildable semantic projection; Slack is a strict memory intake agent. Telegram addition and cheapest high-performing model are unresolved.
payload.decision: Brain DB is the source of truth; Cognee should be a rebuildable semantic projection; Slack should act as a strict memory intake agent. Telegram addition and cheapest high-performing model remain open questions.

entity_resolution.reason: No new entity disambiguation was required; the input states architectural preferences and open questions only.

payload.intent: Record the current Brain architecture preferences and open questions as durable memory, preserving unresolved items as unknowns.

memory_cards.statement: Brain DB should be the source of truth for memory.
Cognee should function as a rebuildable semantic projection rather than the authoritative memory store.
Slack should be used as a strict memory intake agent.
It is still unresolved whether Telegram should be added later.
It is still unresolved which model is cheapest while saturating performance.

details: Preserved two open questions as unresolved.
No superseded or deleted facts introduced.

repair_options: Confirm whether Telegram should be added later.
Benchmark candidate models to identify the cheapest option that still saturates performance.
